metadata.description: Review manuscript structure and provide revision guidance for removing Routes 1/2/3 framing in favor of hypothesis-driven narrative

annotation.content:
Restructure manuscript to remove Routes 1/2/3 terminology and reorganize around the three hypotheses (H1, H2, H3) which already serve as the primary narrative framework

Triggered by: User request for streamlined hypothesis-driven narrative
Status: pending
Type: design

context.reasoning_summary: Migrated from TRACE v1.0 code_contribution CC015

annotation.content:
INTERVENTION (correction)

AI output: All code contributions (CC003-CC012) were logged with 100% ai_authored_lines, regardless of whether the change was human-directed or AI-suggested

Human action: Identified attribution error and directed correction: human-directed changes (CC003, CC004, CC005, CC006, CC007, CC012, CC013, CC014, CC015) should be logged as human_authored_lines; only AI-suggested changes (CC008, CC009, CC010, CC011, CC016) should be ai_authored_lines

Rationale: The distinction matters for accurate attribution: when a human directs a specific change (even if AI executes it), the intellectual contribution is human; when AI suggests content that human approves, the intellectual contribution is AI

Expertise applied: research_methodology, attribution_ethics
Significance: critical
